content.full_text:
June 24, 1992

Fair Political Practices Commission
Attn: John Wallace
428 J Street
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Mr. Wallace:

I am writing to ask if it would be permissable, under the rules of the Fair Political Practices Commission, to contribute a portion of my campaign funds to the Committee to Recall Terry Kastanis.

Campaign contributions have been received in the name of Friends of Illa Collin - '92, I.D. #890526.

Please respond in writing to Supervisor Illa Collin, 7423 Braeridge Way, Sacramento, CA 95831. Thank you for your prompt attention to this request.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
ILLA COLLIN, Supervisor
Second District
